vectors.name: full-remote-http

definition.description: Look up an answer via a remote service.

vectors.canonical: {"description":"Look up an answer via a remote service.","executor":"remote_http","executor_config":{"allow_private":false,"url":"https://tool.example.com/invoke"},"input_schema":{"properties":{"query":{"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"output_schema":{"properties":{"answer":{"type":"string"}},"type":"object"},"replay_class":"idempotent","secret_ref":"sig-ref","timeout_ms":15000}
